title: Childrens Novelty Christmas Stocking Grey & White Gonk Design
features: PERFECT FOR THE NIGHT BEFORE CHRISTMAS - Magical Christmas Stocking to put in all your child's presents. Store them in the stocking and hang using the hook, all ready for opening the presents on Christmas morning
FUN AND TRADITIONAL FESTIVE DESIGN - The stocking is grey and white with the classic Nordic Gonk design on the front with a tartan hat and bushy beard
PREMIUM QUALITY - Grey felt style Xmas Stocking made with 100% polyester for great durability, securely stitched with a secure hanging hook
ENJOY A SUSTAINABLE CHRISTMAS: These gift sacks can re-used time and time again and come in fully recyclable packaging
SPACE FOR LOTS OF GIFTS - Plenty of room for lots of toys. Approx size: 40cm
description: Add some Scandinavian charm to your holiday season with this stylish stocking. This Nordic-inspired Gonk stocking is the perfect addition to your holiday decor. The stocking is grey and white with the classic Gonk on the front with a tartan hat and bushy beard. The stocking itself is made of durable fabric and features a loop for easy hanging. Perfect to fill with holiday treats and small gifts.
